name: Safe synthetic playbook: Object storage bucket marked public
description: Cloud posture drift where a lab bucket ACL/policy grants world-readable listing. Uses fake resource names and synthetic ARNs only—no presigned URLs, no data download instructions.

simulated_timeline.synthetic_narrative: Cloud posture scan records public-read equivalent on bucket lab-sim-invoices-archive.
DLP tag simulation suggests possible sensitive prefix (label only, no file contents).
Policy requests private ACL and logging enablement simulation.

events_emitted.headline: CSPM finding for public bucket
events_emitted.synthetic_detail: Resource identifiers are imaginary; tenancy is sandbox only.

events_emitted.headline: Audit trail corroboration
events_emitted.synthetic_detail: Configuration change correlated to deployment pipeline label LAB-REL-884.

expected_agents_triggered.triggered_reason_synthetic: External/cloud surface inventory contributes to exposure scoring.
Data classification and retention policies evaluated.

expected_remediation.summary: Remove public principal, enforce private-only policy, enable access logging and inventory export (simulation).

expected_autonomous_remediation.synthetic_action: Draft restrictive bucket policy JSON in dry-run sandbox.

expected_human_approval_gates.synthetic_rationale: Temporary public buckets sometimes exist for migrations; humans confirm revocation.
Determine if contractual breach notification thresholds met (fixture assessment).

expected_final_report.title: Public cloud bucket — synthetic playbook outcome
expected_final_report.synthetic_executive_summary: A lab bucket flagged public-equivalent posture; playbook covers lockdown path and governance attestations.
